_meta.name: p25
_meta.method: Central saturated-core centroid, side parhelion warm-index scan, and visual confirmation against 22-degree halo diagnostic overlay.
_meta.status: belt-y FF robustness anchor with single-side confidence caveat; do not treat as a clean deciding vote without manual review
_meta.note: Right-side parhelion and belt reference are cleaner than the left. The left warm centroid is pulled downward by a broad/foreground-contaminated feature, so this anchor should retain its caveat in any FF result table.

r22_source_note: p25 shows no continuous 22° halo arc — only parhelia. R22 was set from the parhelion offsets, so the parhelion-route residual is tautological on this photo. Audit memo §2 item 7 confirms. Pass B1 classification 2026-05-13; ineligible for parhelion-route promotion regardless of residual.

parhelion.tilt_flag: left/right y differ by 36 px; left side is foreground/flare contaminated
